cases.rules_text:
1. Mirror crossing requires a border lantern signal and either an unlit gate passage or crossing without a reflection stamp.
2. Shadow cargo irregularity includes carrying a shadowless box or cargo vanishing in the mirror.
3. Label inversion requires an inverted label action followed by cargo movement.
4. Customs clearance requires a silver customs token, clock record, and officer confirmation.
5. Mirror rescue transfer requires a broken-mirror alarm, rescue transfer, and gate log.
6. Returned cargo record requires return to origin, a return receipt, and a matching crate seal.
7. The unregistered mirror crossing basis is present when mirror crossing occurs.
8. The shadow cargo irregularity basis requires mirror crossing with shadow-cargo irregularity.
9. The label inversion basis requires shadow-cargo irregularity with label inversion.
10. The customs clearance authorization basis requires customs clearance connected to mirror crossing.
11. The mirror rescue transfer basis requires rescue transfer connected to mirror crossing.
12. The returned cargo allowance basis requires a returned-cargo record connected to shadow-cargo irregularity.
13. The unregistered mirror crossing article covers unregistered mirror crossing basis; the prescribed consequence is mirror gate warning.
14. The shadow cargo irregularity article covers shadow cargo irregularity basis; the prescribed consequence is shadow cargo hold.
15. The label inversion article covers label inversion basis; the prescribed consequence is inversion ledger sealing.
16. The customs clearance authorization article covers customs clearance authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
17. The mirror rescue transfer article covers mirror rescue transfer basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
18. The returned cargo allowance article covers returned cargo allowance basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
19. Where the shadow cargo irregularity article and the unregistered mirror crossing article both apply, the shadow cargo irregularity article prevails.
20. Where the label inversion article and the unregistered mirror crossing article both apply, the label inversion article prevails.
21. Where the label inversion article and the shadow cargo irregularity article both apply, the label inversion article prevails.
22. The customs clearance authorization article operates as an exception to the unregistered mirror crossing article when both apply.
23. The customs clearance authorization article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
24. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the unregistered mirror crossing article when both apply.
25. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
26. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the label inversion article when both apply.
27. The returned cargo allowance article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
cases.case_text: Avery passed through an unlit mirror gate. The border lantern turned blue. The cargo did not move after the label change. Avery did not hold a silver customs token. The broken-mirror alarm did not sound. The cargo was not returned to origin.

  using f2 f1

  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps shadow_cargo_irregularity_basis_def mirror_crossing_def shadow_cargo_irregularity_def
  by simp
lemma not_trigger_art_label_inversion: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Label_Inversion actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps label_inversion_basis_def shadow_cargo_irregularity_def label_inversion_def
  by simp

  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps customs_clearance_authorization_basis_def customs_clearance_def mirror_crossing_def
  by simp
lemma not_trigger_art_mirror_rescue_transfer: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Mirror_Rescue_Transfer actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17

  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps returned_cargo_allowance_basis_def returned_cargo_record_def shadow_cargo_irregularity_def
  by simp

lemma not_defeated_art_unregistered_mirror_crossing: "\<not> defeated actor Art_Unregistered_Mirror_Crossing"
proof
  assume defeated_assm: "defeated actor Art_Unregistered_Mirror_Crossing"
  then obtain higher where
    higher_triggered: "article_triggered higher actor"
    and higher_overrides: "overrides higher Art_Unregistered_Mirror_Crossing"
    unfolding defeated_def by blast
  then show False
    using not_trigger_art_shadow_cargo_irregularity not_trigger_art_label_inversion not_trigger_art_customs_clearance_authorization not_trigger_art_mirror_rescue_transfer
    unfolding overrides_def
    by (cases higher) auto
qed

  unfolding applicable_def
  by blast

  using not_trigger_art_customs_clearance_authorization
  unfolding applicable_def
  by blast
lemma not_applicable_art_mirror_rescue_transfer: "\<not> applicable actor Art_Mirror_Rescue_Transfer"

lemma not_final_no_liability: "\<not> final_no_liability actor"
proof
  assume final_no_liability_assm: "final_no_liability actor"
  then obtain art where
    art_applicable: "applicable actor art"
    and art_result: "article_result art = No_Criminal_Liability"
    unfolding final_no_liability_def by blast
  show False
    using art_applicable art_result not_applicable_art_customs_clearance_authorization not_applicable_art_mirror_rescue_transfer not_applicable_art_returned_cargo_allowance
    by (cases art) auto
qed
theorem final_result_liability: "final_legal_result_holds actor mirror_gate_warning"
  using applicable_art_unregistered_mirror_crossing not_final_no_liability
  unfolding final_legal_result_holds_def
  by auto

end

cases.rules_text:
1. Mirror crossing requires a border lantern signal and either an unlit gate passage or crossing without a reflection stamp.

3. Label inversion requires an inverted label action followed by cargo movement.
4. Customs clearance requires a silver customs token, clock record, and officer confirmation.

7. The unregistered mirror crossing basis is present when mirror crossing occurs.
8. The shadow cargo irregularity basis requires mirror crossing with shadow-cargo irregularity.

10. The customs clearance authorization basis requires customs clearance connected to mirror crossing.

17. The mirror rescue transfer article covers mirror rescue transfer basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.

23. The customs clearance authorization article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
24. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the unregistered mirror crossing article when both apply.
25. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.

The cargo moved after the label change. The broken-mirror alarm sounded. Hayes transferred cargo for rescue. The rescue was logged at the gate. Hayes did not hold a silver customs token. The cargo was not returned to origin.

cases.rules_text:
1. Mirror crossing requires a border lantern signal and either an unlit gate passage or crossing without a reflection stamp.
2. Shadow cargo irregularity includes carrying a shadowless box or cargo vanishing in the mirror.
3. Label inversion requires an inverted label action followed by cargo movement.
4. Customs clearance requires a silver customs token, clock record, and officer confirmation.
5. Mirror rescue transfer requires a broken-mirror alarm, rescue transfer, and gate log.
6. Returned cargo record requires return to origin, a return receipt, and a matching crate seal.
7. The unregistered mirror crossing basis is present when mirror crossing occurs.
8. The shadow cargo irregularity basis requires mirror crossing with shadow-cargo irregularity.
9. The label inversion basis requires shadow-cargo irregularity with label inversion.
10. The customs clearance authorization basis requires customs clearance connected to mirror crossing.
11. The mirror rescue transfer basis requires rescue transfer connected to mirror crossing.
12. The returned cargo allowance basis requires a returned-cargo record connected to shadow-cargo irregularity.
13. The unregistered mirror crossing article covers unregistered mirror crossing basis; the prescribed consequence is mirror gate warning.
14. The shadow cargo irregularity article covers shadow cargo irregularity basis; the prescribed consequence is shadow cargo hold.
15. The label inversion article covers label inversion basis; the prescribed consequence is inversion ledger sealing.
16. The customs clearance authorization article covers customs clearance authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
17. The mirror rescue transfer article covers mirror rescue transfer basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
18. The returned cargo allowance article covers returned cargo allowance basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
19. Where the shadow cargo irregularity article and the unregistered mirror crossing article both apply, the shadow cargo irregularity article prevails.
20. Where the label inversion article and the unregistered mirror crossing article both apply, the label inversion article prevails.
21. Where the label inversion article and the shadow cargo irregularity article both apply, the label inversion article prevails.
22. The customs clearance authorization article operates as an exception to the unregistered mirror crossing article when both apply.
23. The customs clearance authorization article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
24. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the unregistered mirror crossing article when both apply.
25. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
26. The mirror rescue transfer article operates as an exception to the label inversion article when both apply.
27. The returned cargo allowance article operates as an exception to the shadow cargo irregularity article when both apply.
cases.case_text: Finch crossed without a reflection stamp. The border lantern turned blue. The cargo vanished in the mirror. Finch attached a reversed crescent tag. The cargo moved after the label change. Finch held a silver customs token. The customs clock recorded arrival. A mirror officer confirmed the token. The cargo was returned to origin. A return receipt was issued. The crate seal matched the origin seal. The broken-mirror alarm did not sound.
